/workspace/host-tools/gcc/riscv64-linux-musl-x86_64/bin/riscv64-unknown-linux-musl-g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgvision.so -o libgvision.so CMakeFiles/gvision.dir/decoder/DecoderAbstract.cc.o CMakeFiles/gvision.dir/decoder/LibavDecoder.cc.o CMakeFiles/gvision.dir/decoder/LibavDecodeContext.cc.o CMakeFiles/gvision.dir/decoder/libav_utils.cc.o   -L/workspace/ffmpeg_libs_n4.4.4.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/ffmpeg_libs_n4.4.4.2/lib /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_core.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_features2d.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_highgui.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_imgproc.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_photo.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_video.a -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lswresample /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_imgproc.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_core.a -ldl -lm -lrt  -latomic
